mapper.sql: id, market, round_no, trade_date, submit_open, submit_close, execute_at, settle_at, cancel_deadline, pricing_method, status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trading_rounds (market, round_no, trade_date, submit_open, submit_close, execute_at, settle_at, cancel_deadline, pricing_method, status) VALUES (#{market}, #{roundNo}, #{tradeDate}, #{submitOpen}, #{submitClose}, #{executeAt}, #{settleAt}, #{cancelDeadline}, #{pricingMethod}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM trading_rounds WHERE status = 'OPEN' AND execute_at <= #{now} ORDER BY execute_at
mapper.update: UPDATE trading_rounds SET status = 'EXECUTING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'OPEN'
UPDATE trading_rounds SET status = 'SETTLED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'EXECUTING'
UPDATE trading_rounds SET status = 'FAILED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'EXECUTING'
